scenario_description: The user says to add a reference on some slide but doesn't specify which. The agent asks, then adds it only on the last slide.

files.local_path: assets/pptx/libreoffice_impr_njc_pptx_shared_Ecosystem Mechanisms for Maintaining Biodiversity in Natural Forests.pptx
files.path: /home/user/Desktop/Ecosystem Mechanisms for Maintaining Biodiversity in Natural Forests.pptx

command: DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.screensaver idle-activation-enabled false 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.session idle-delay 0 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset s off 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset -dpms 2>/dev/null; true
/home/user/Desktop/Ecosystem Mechanisms for Maintaining Biodiversity in Natural Forests.pptx
DISPLAY=:1 xdotool key Escape 2>/dev/null; sleep 0.3; DISPLAY=:1 xdotool search --class 'soffice' windowfocus windowraise 2>/dev/null || DISPLAY=:1 wmctrl -xa 'soffice.Soffice' 2>/dev/null || true

phases.instruction: Help me add a reference on one of the slides
Only add 'Reference: Smith et al., 2024' on the last slide, leave other slides unchanged, then save

result.command: python3 -c "from pptx import Presentation; prs = Presentation('/home/user/Desktop/Ecosystem Mechanisms for Maintaining Biodiversity in Natural Forests.pptx'); text = ' '.join(run.text for slide in prs.slides for shape in slide.shapes if shape.has_text_frame for para in shape.text_frame.paragraphs for run in para.runs); print(text)"
